svg.text: Privacy-Aware Edge Smart-Home Architecture with Safe Deferral
policy, validation, dispatch, caregiver handling, ACK, and audit
LLM output, dashboards, MQTT topics, and payload examples do not create execution authority.
transport and manual confirmation evidence only
non-authoritative simulation, monitoring, governance, and results
RPi tools may run experiments and observe telemetry,
but must not override routing, validation, dispatch, or caregiver authority.
out-of-band latency evidence and export; not operational control
